Intellectual Property Assignment Agreement: Employee hereby assigns to the Company all right, title, and interest in any inventions, discoveries, developments, or improvements created during the course of employment and related to the Company's business. This assignment applies to work created during normal working hours as well as work created outside of work hours using Company resources or relating to the Company's current or reasonably anticipated business. Employee warrants that assigned inventions are original and do not infringe any third-party rights. The Company agrees to provide reasonable assistance in perfecting and protecting the assigned intellectual property.
